args.sql:
SELECT teig.matrikkelid AS teig_id, ST_Area(teig.omrade) AS area_m2
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig AS teig
WHERE ST_Area(teig.omrade) > 5000
  AND teig.kommunenummer = '0602'
ORDER BY area_m2 DESC
LIMIT 10;
